economic_notes: Nation holds 11.1% interest in MLTC Resource Development Limited Partnership and 99% in MSFN Economic Development Company LP. Owns 100% of Makwa Lake Development Co. and MSFN Economic Development Company Ltd. Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9-nation organization). Treaty 6 surrender claim and treaty benefit claim initiated March 2020 with costs of $1,889,512 omitted from financial statements pending settlement.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Consolidated entity includes MSFN Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, and Store Enterprise. Four entities recorded under modified equity method (GBEs/LPs): Makwa Lake Development Co., Meadow Lake Resource Development LP, MSFN Economic Development LP, MSFN Economic Development Ltd. Treaty claim costs of ~$1.89M omitted from financial statements and only disclosed. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + Ottawa Trust + Health Canada + Meadow Lake Tribal Council + Saskatchewan Lotteries + CMHC + Northern Lights + First Nations Trust = 29,375,583. OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Annual debt service based on repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement.
